title: TXT Connector Error Messages
text: TXT Connector Error Messages Operating system-specific error numbers are available via $dberror . For an explanation of error numbers which might be returned, see your operating system documentation. The following codes may be returned by the U2.0 TXT connector. Table 1. Errors Returned by TXT U2.0 Connector Error Number Error Message -36 Invalid Unicode character set specified in USYS$TXT_PARAMS -37 Invalid option specified in USYS$TXT_PARAMS -38 Could not position the file at the start for the Unicode BOM -39 File contents without Unicode BOM detected, cannot append Unicode data -40 File contents with Unicode BOM detected, cannot append non-Unicode data -41 Could not write Unicode BOM to file Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
